children.text: provide for insurance of official motor vehicles in a foreign country when the laws of such country require such insurance; and
purchase right-hand drive passenger sedans at a cost of not more than $30,000 each.

children.heading: .—Hire of Passenger Vehicles
children.label: b .—Hire of Passenger Vehicles
children.text: Amounts appropriated to the Department of Defense for operation and maintenance of the active forces may be used for the hire of passenger motor vehicles.
